utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Well obviously only one of us can keep dating her .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Obviously ! So , how do we decide ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Well now let ... let look at this objectively , I think I should date her .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Uh ... huh . Uh ... huh .

emotion_cause.span: 3_let ... let look at this objectively , I think I should date her .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: That is interesting , but check this out . I date her

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Yeah ... yeah I like that but just to go in another direction

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Okay , okay . This can go on for a while .

emotion_cause.span: 7_This can go on for a while .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Yeah well we should order some food then .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: No Joey ! Look why do not , why do not we just let her decide ? Okay ? Hey ... hey , we will each go out with her one more time . And ... and we’ll see who she likes best .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: That sounds fair .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Maybe I will take her to that new French restaurant down the street

emotion_cause.span: 11_Maybe I will take her to that new French restaurant down the street

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Ah yeah ... wait a second now !

emotion_cause.span: 11_Maybe I will take her to that new French restaurant down the street

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Look we are gonna have to set a spending limit on the date .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I do not have the money to take her to a fancy place like that .

emotion_cause.span: 14_I do not have the money to take her to a fancy place like that .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Well sorry , that is what I do on dates .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: All right , well I guess I will just have to do what I do on dates .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: So let decide on the spending limit

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Yeah . Uh , ... a slice ... six dollars ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I was thinking more like a hundred .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Okay . Can I borrow 94 dollars ?
